description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_HOST variables. Define three stages: build, test, and release, and variables CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. Include a before_script that logs into the registry with echo "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" | docker login -u gitlab-ci-token $CI_REGISTRY --password-stdin. In the build stage add a build job that runs docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . then docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. In the test stage add a .test_web_connection job that runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker run --detach -p 5000:5000 $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, and curl --insecure -s --head http://localhost:5000 | sed -n '1p' | grep -q '200' && (echo 'Status code 200 test: pass' && exit 0) || (echo 'Status code 200 test: fail' && exit 1). In the release stage add a release-image job that only runs on the master branch, runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE.
